decision.triage_reasoning: The patient is exhibiting rapid cognitive decline, seizures, and significant mobility issues, which pose a serious risk of deterioration and possible life-threatening consequences.
decision.notes: Multiple serious symptoms indicating possible neurological issues that require immediate evaluation.
decision.context_for_next: Patient has neurological symptoms that must be addressed urgently.
Order an urgent neurological test to start evaluation of the patient’s symptoms.

decision.test_outcome: CSF protein: 250 mg/dL, 14-3-3 protein: positive, EEG: periodic sharp wave complexes, MRI findings: basal ganglia hyperintensities

decision.context_for_next: Currently, only one test has been completed which indicates possible serious neurological conditions requiring additional testing before a diagnosis can be made.

decision.test_outcome: Protein levels: 110 mg/dL, 14-3-3 protein: Positive, Tau protein: 900 pg/mL, Beta-amyloid: <500 pg/mL, Neuron-specific enolase: 20 ng/mL

decision.context_for_next: Need additional testing to meet diagnostic criteria for neurological symptoms.

decision.test_outcome: Brain MRI: hyperintensity in basal ganglia, EEG: periodic sharp waves, CSF: 14-3-3 protein positive

decision.recommended_treatment: Refer to a neurologist for specialized care and supportive treatment. Consider brain biopsy if necessary for definitive diagnosis.
decision.context_for_next: Patient exhibits critical neurological symptoms consistent with Creutzfeldt-Jakob Disease. All required tests completed with positive results for key indicators.

final_diagnosis.recommended_treatment: Refer to a neurologist for specialized care and supportive treatment. Consider brain biopsy if necessary for definitive diagnosis.
final_diagnosis.context_for_next: Patient exhibits critical neurological symptoms consistent with Creutzfeldt-Jakob Disease. All required tests completed with positive results for key indicators.
